title: tussilago reflexa
intro: Tussilago reflexa, also known as coltsfoot, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its bright yellow daisy-like flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its expectorant properties, helping to relieve congestion and coughs. The leaves and flowers of Tussilago reflexa contain flavonoids and saponins, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. Tussilago reflexa is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be consumed as a dried flower or leaf.
